name: ABUNDIA GLOBAL IMPACT GROUP, INC.
summary: Abundia Global Impact Group, Inc. (AGIG) operates in the recycling and renewable energy sector as well as the oil and gas sector. The company focuses on activities related to recycling, renewable energy, and oil and gas operations. Specific products and services are not detailed in the provided excerpt, but the company pursues strategic relationships and aims for growth across these two primary industry segments.
